mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, code, description, icon, embedding_model, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, separator, document_count, chunk_count, total_tokens, status, sort_order, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_knowledge_base
AND status = #{status}
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_knowledge_base WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_knowledge_base (name, code, description, icon, embedding_model, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, separator, document_count, chunk_count, total_tokens, status, sort_order, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{icon}, #{embeddingModel}, #{chunkSize}, #{chunkOverlap}, #{separator}, 0, 0, 0, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_knowledge_base kb SET kb.document_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_knowledge_document WHERE knowledge_id = kb.id), kb.chunk_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_knowledge_chunk WHERE knowledge_id = kb.id), kb.total_tokens = (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(token_count), 0) FROM ai_knowledge_chunk WHERE knowledge_id = kb.id), kb.updated_at = NOW() WHERE kb.id = #{id}
